description: Style NoteWho says innerwear has to be boring? Its pure cotton composition offers maximum comfort while its wide elasticated waist band ensures a snug Fit.Product DetailsRed brief, black elasticized waistband with branding for a smooth and comfortable grip, double layered front for extra support and comfort, features an attractive print at the back, high cut design allows free leg movement, printed branding on the inside offers abrasion-free comfortMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not iron on printSize and FitRegular riseThe model (height 6' and waist 32'') is wearing a size M The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
